chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1140 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2331/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.2332/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16-09-2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
